---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Samples Received - P.generosa Gonad Histology Blocks and Slides
date: '2026-05-06'
draft: false
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "Panopea generosa"
  - "Samples Received"
  - "gonad"
  - "histology"
  - "Pacific geoduck"
---
# INTRO

Received the histology blocks and H&E-stained slides for the [_Panopea generosa_ (Pacific geoduck)](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Geoduck) (Wikipedia) gonad samples submitted on [20260414](../2026-04-14-Samples-Submitted---Geoduck-Gonad-Histology/index.qmd) (Notebook entry). Slides were added to the [histology database](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BIbDleJPEiKrmx7JwNIPwg2pM-thuZ39upmenldx4pA/edit?usp=sharing) (Google Sheet).

Additionally, I imaged the slides at 4x and 10x objective magnications. Image files are named like so:

`20260427-1-A-X-4x-01.tif` where:
- `20260427` is the date (April 27, 2026)
- `1-A-X` is the sample ID
- `4x` is the magnification
- `01` is the image number



::: {.callout-important}
Slides were given to Kendall Barton (Marine Ecologist) of the Tulalip Tribeson 20260519 to be able to analyze them in more detail.

:::



All images are available here:

- [https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/)

# MATERIALS & METHODS

Slides were imaged using using an Olypmus BH2-RFCA microscope with an AmScope MU530-BI camera. Images were captured using AmLite software and saved as TIFF files. Files also converted to JPEG format for easier viewing and sharing. Each slide was imaged at 4x and 10x magnification, with a single image taken at each magnification.


# RESULTS

All images are below. The H&E stain allows for visualization of tissue structure and cell morphology, with nuclei appearing blue and cytoplasm appearing pink.

::: {#fig-histology layout-ncol=2}

![1-A-X 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-1-A-X-4x-01.jpg)

![1-A-X 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-1-A-X-10x-01.jpg)

![1-P-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-1-P-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![1-P-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-1-P-IN-10x-01.jpg)

![2-A-X 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-2-A-X-4x-01.jpg)

![2-A-X 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-2-A-X-10x-01.jpg)

![2-P-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-2-P-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![2-P-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-2-P-IN-10x-01.jpg)

![3-M-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-M-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![3-M-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-M-IN-10x-01.jpg)

![3-M-X 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-M-X-4x-01.jpg)

![3-M-X 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-M-X-10x-01.jpg)

![3-P-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-P-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![3-P-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-3-P-IN-10x-01.jpg)

![4-A-X 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-A-X-4x-01.jpg)

![4-A-X 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-A-X-10x-01.jpg)

![4-M-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-M-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![4-M-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-M-IN-10x-01.jpg)

![4-P-IN 4x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-P-IN-4x-01.jpg)

![4-P-IN 10x](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/hesperornis/P_generosa/histo-pgen-gonad-H_E_stain-barton-20260427/20260427-4-P-IN-10x-01.jpg)

H&E-stained _P. generosa_ gonad sections. Left column: 4x magnification; right column: 10x magnification.
:::
